text:
M1034 Overall Status This field describes the patient's overall status. 00 = The patient is stable with no heightened risk(s) for serious
complications and death (beyond those typical of the patient's age).
01 = The patient is temporarily facing high health risk(s) but is likely to
return to being stable without heightened risk(s) for serious complications and death (beyond those typical of the patient's age).
02 = The patient is likely to remain in fragile health and have ongoing
